## SECTION 8: BENCHMARK RESEARCH

### 8.1 ODK Collect / KoboToolbox

**What works in ADL:**
- Offline-first architecture (correctly implemented)
- Skip logic and validation
- GPS auto-capture with accuracy indicators

**What ADL improves on:**
- Map-first, POI-centric (not form-centric)
- Visual feedback and gamification
- Photo overlay guides
- Photo as structured evidence

### 8.2 Mapillary

**What works in ADL's batch mode:**
- Continuous capture mode
- Screen dimming during capture
- Upload queue with progress and retry

**What ADL improves on:**
- Offline map tiles
- Structured POI data (not just imagery)
- Quality-weighted scoring, streaks, badges

### 8.3 OpenStreetMap (StreetComplete, iD, JOSM)

**StreetComplete patterns in ADL:**
- Map-based "quests" → ADL's "assignments"
- Question-answer flow
- Gamification with solved quest counts
- Offline capability

**ADL improvements:**
- Photo-first evidence approach
- Formal review process
- Fraud detection
- Incentive alignment

### 8.4 African Tech Design Patterns

**From M-Pesa:**
- Simplicity (less is more)
- Trust through simplicity
- Offline resilience (USSD fallback model)
- Green color scheme (trust signal) → ADL's forest green

**From Jumia:**
- Performance-first design
- Light pages, compressed images
- Step-by-step flows (informs progress)
- Localized experience

**Key Takeaways for ADL:**
1. Minimize data usage (compress photos, cache map tiles, lazy load)
2. Step-based flows (break actions into discrete steps)
3. Large touch targets (cracked screens, dusty/humid conditions)
4. Trust signals (verification badges, sync status, quality scores)
5. Bottom navigation (already correct in ADL)

### 8.5 Comparative Feature Matrix

Features ADL has (Proposed only):
- Offline map tiles
- Photo with overlay guides
- Enhanced fraud detection
- Step-based wizard
- Batch capture mode
- Voice input
- Enhanced gamification
- Quality-weighted leaderboard
- Enhanced assignment system
- Enhanced admin review queue
- Enhanced delta reports
- Client dashboard

---

## SECTION 9: COMPONENT RECOMMENDATIONS

### 9.1 Key Components to Build or Refactor

| Component | Status | Priority | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| **SyncStatusBar** | NEW | P0 | Always-visible sync indicator below header |
| **CaptureWizard** | REFACTOR | P0 | ContributionFlow refactored to 4-step |
| **PhotoCapture** | REFACTOR | P0 | Add overlay guides per vertical, GPS confidence |
| **BatchCaptureMode** | NEW | P1 | Camera-stays-active rapid capture |
| **SubmissionQueue** | NEW | P1 | Dedicated screen for pending/failed/synced |
| **VoiceInput** | NEW | P2 | Web Speech API wrapper, French-Cameroon locale |
| **AssignmentCard** | NEW | P1 | Home screen active assignment widget |
| **ProximityBar** | NEW | P2 | Map overlay showing nearby POIs needing data |
| **QualityPreview** | NEW | P1 | Pre-submit quality score breakdown |
| **DailyProgress** | NEW | P2 | Home screen daily stats and target progress |

### 9.2 Tailwind Component Patterns

**CARD COMPONENT:**
```
bg-white p-5 rounded-2xl border border-gray-100 shadow-sm
```

**PRIMARY BUTTON:**
```
h-14 bg-[#0f2b46] text-white rounded-xl font-bold text-xs
uppercase tracking-wider shadow-lg flex items-center
justify-center active:scale-95 transition-all
```

**CTA BUTTON (Contribute/Add):**
```
h-14 bg-[#c86b4a] text-white rounded-xl font-bold text-xs
uppercase tracking-wider shadow-lg
```

**SUCCESS INDICATOR:**
```
text-[#4c7c59] bg-[#eaf3ee] rounded-full px-3 py-1
text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest
```

**STATUS BADGE:**
```
px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-[9px] font-bold uppercase
tracking-widest
```

**FORM FIELD:**
```
h-11 px-3 bg-gray-100 rounded-xl text-xs font-semibold
text-[#0f2b46]
```

**SECTION LABEL:**
```
text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest
```

**BOTTOM NAV:**
```
h-16 bg-white border-t border-gray-200 flex items-center
justify-around
```

**FAB (Floating Action Button):**
```
w-14 h-14 bg-[#c86b4a] text-white rounded-full shadow-2xl
flex items-center justify-center
```

### 9.3 Animation & Feedback

| Interaction | Feedback | Duration |
|---|---|---|
| Button press | `active:scale-95` | 100ms |
| Screen transition | Slide from right (forward) / left (back) | 200ms |
| Submission success | Checkmark animation + XP popup | 800ms |
| Sync complete | Green pulse on sync indicator | 300ms |
| Error | Shake animation on error element | 200ms |
| Level up | Full-screen overlay with confetti | 1500ms |
| Photo capture | Shutter flash (white overlay) | 100ms |
| GPS lock | Pulsing blue dot → solid blue dot | Continuous → 0ms |

---

## SECTION 10: IMPLEMENTATION PRIORITY

### Phase 1: Core Field Optimization (Week 1-2)
1. **SyncStatusBar** - Always-visible sync status on all screens
2. **CaptureWizard** - Refactor ContributionFlow to 4-step wizard
3. **PhotoCapture** - Add overlay guides and GPS confidence indicator
4. **QualityPreview** - Pre-submit quality score on review step

### Phase 2: Productivity Features (Week 3-4)
5. **AssignmentCard** - Home screen widget for active assignments
6. **BatchCaptureMode** - Rapid capture for dense commercial areas
7. **SubmissionQueue** - Dedicated queue screen with retry controls
8. **DailyProgress** - Home screen daily stats widget

### Phase 3: Engagement & Polish (Week 5-6)
9. **Enhanced Gamification** - Streak system, achievement badges, quality-weighted leaderboard
10. **VoiceInput** - Web Speech API for text fields
11. **ProximityBar** - Nearby POI suggestions on map
12. **Offline map tiles** - Pre-cached Leaflet tiles for Bonamoussadi area

### Phase 4: Admin & Client Dashboards (Week 7-8)
13. **Admin split-panel review** - Desktop-optimized review queue
14. **Client dashboard** - Vertical-specific views with delta visualization
15. **Export interface** - CSV, GeoJSON, PDF generation
16. **API documentation** - Interactive API explorer for clients

---

This comprehensive inventory covers every feature, component, UI element, color specification, typography setting, interaction pattern, and implementation detail described in the research document. Each item is organized by section and includes specific implementation details, hex codes, dimensions, and behavioral specifications.
Now let me explore what's currently implemented to identify the gaps.

content.text:
Now let me compile my findings into a comprehensive audit report. Based on my analysis of the codebase, I'll provide the feature audit:

## Comprehensive Feature Audit - African Data Layer React App

Based on my thorough examination of the codebase at `/Users/charlesvictormahouve/Documents/GitHub/africandatalayer`, here's the detailed status of all 30 features:

### **EXISTS / IMPLEMENTED:**

1. **SyncStatusBar** - EXISTS (FULL)
   - File: `/components/SyncStatusBar.tsx`
   - Always-visible sticky bar below header showing sync status (pending, failed, syncing, or synced)
   - Appears on all screens via App.tsx integration
   - Shows priorities: failed > offline+pending > syncing > all synced

2. **4-step wizard in ContributionFlow** - PARTIAL
   - File: `/components/Screens/ContributionFlow.tsx` (lines 1668-1687)
   - Shows 3 progress indicators with dots: Type → Photo → GPS (not full 4-step)
   - Not a traditional multi-step form; appears to be a single scrollable/tabbed form with progress dots
   - Visual indicators track completion of mandatory fields

3. **Assignment card on Home screen** - EXISTS (FULL)
   - File: `/components/Screens/Home.tsx` (lines 531-571)
   - "Active Assignment" widget showing zone label, assigned verticals, status, progress bar, and due date
   - Appears above daily progress widgets for agents with active assignments

4. **Batch capture mode** - EXISTS (FULL)
   - File: `/components/Screens/Home.tsx` (lines 421-430)
   - Long-press trigger (550ms) on contribute button enters batch mode
   - File: `/components/Screens/ContributionFlow.tsx` has `batchCapturedCount` state (line 296)
   - Batch mode tracked throughout contribution flow

5. **Daily progress widget on Home** - EXISTS (FULL)
   - File: `/components/DailyProgressWidget.tsx`
   - Shows: Submissions (today), Enrichments (today), Avg Quality %, Streak days
   - Progress bar showing daily target vs current submissions
   - Displayed on Home screen for authenticated agents (lines 575-582)

6. **Streak system widget** - EXISTS (FULL)
   - File: `/components/StreakTracker.tsx`
   - Visual streak display with 7 day dots (M T W T F S S)
   - Active days shown as filled boxes, inactive as "..."
   - Displays current streak count with flame icon

7. **Badge system** - EXISTS (FULL)
   - File: `/components/BadgeSystem.tsx`
   - 10 dynamic badges computed from PointEvents: First Steps, Explorer, Specialist, Quality Star, Night Owl, Rain Walker, Streak Master, Urban Validator, Data Champion, Trust Elite
   - Progress bars for unearned badges
   - Displayed in Profile screen

8. **XP popup with animation** - EXISTS (PARTIAL)
   - File: `/components/XPPopup.tsx`
   - Shows +XP breakdown (Base, Quality bonus, Streak bonus)
   - Level progress bar
   - Displays after submission capture
   - Limited animation (no explicit animation keyframes visible)

9. **Quality-weighted leaderboard** - EXISTS (FULL)
   - File: `/api/leaderboard/index.ts` (lines 92-103)
   - Ranking Score = contributions × average quality score
   - Calculates quality-weighted sort at backend
   - Integrated in `/components/Screens/Analytics.tsx` (line 418)

10. **Submission Queue screen** - EXISTS (FULL)
    - File: `/components/Screens/SubmissionQueue.tsx`
    - Dedicated screen showing: pending, failed, synced counts + storage usage
    - Lists failed items (with retry/edit/delete), pending items, rejected items
    - Force sync button and individual item retry functionality

11. **High-contrast mode** - EXISTS (FULL)
    - File: `/components/Screens/Settings.tsx` (lines 26-36)
    - Toggle in Settings screen adds/removes `high-contrast` class on document
    - Persisted in localStorage

12. **Agent location pin on map** - EXISTS (FULL)
    - File: `/components/Screens/HomeMap.tsx` (lines 68-100)
    - Blue dot with accuracy circle using Geolocation API
    - Watches position with high accuracy enabled

13. **Export interface** - EXISTS (PARTIAL)
    - File: `/components/ExportPanel.tsx`
    - Supports: CSV, GeoJSON, PDF export formats
    - Scope/filter selection visible
    - Does not show explicit confidence/GPS accuracy filters in UI

14. **Delta reports enhanced** - EXISTS (PARTIAL)
    - File: `/components/Screens/DeltaDashboard.tsx`
    - Period selection (52 weeks via limit param)
    - By-vertical breakdown (selectedVertical filter)
    - Trend data and delta breakdown charts
    - Export buttons via ExportPanel

15. **Client vertical dashboard** - EXISTS (FULL)
    - App.tsx shows client role has access to Screen.DELTA_DASHBOARD (line 109)
    - DeltaDashboard provides per-vertical view with stats and anomalies

---

### **MISSING / NOT IMPLEMENTED:**

16. **Photo overlay guides** - MISSING
    - No photo capture overlay frames or vertical-specific guide overlays found
    - No "Capture the green cross sign" type instructions

17. **GPS confidence indicator** - MISSING
    - No visual GPS accuracy bar/indicator during capture
    - GPS accuracy tracked internally but not displayed as UI indicator

18. **Quality preview before submit** - MISSING
    - No review step showing quality score breakdown (GPS accuracy, photo quality, completeness)
    - Submission goes directly from form to XP popup

19. **Voice input** - MISSING
    - No Web Speech API or speechSynthesis implementation found
    - No voice-to-text field inputs

20. **Proximity bar on map** - MISSING
    - No "Nearby: 3 pharmacies within 200m" proximity indicator
    - Map shows clustered points only, not proximity suggestions

21. **Level-up celebration** - MISSING
    - No full-screen level up overlay with animation
    - XPPopup shows XP gain but not level up events

22. **Step progress indicators (visual dots)** - PARTIAL
    - Found 3-step progress indicators (Type, Photo, GPS) in ContributionFlow
    - But no dots for a full multi-step flow (only 3 steps shown)

23. **Photo capture guidelines per vertical** - MISSING
    - QualityInfo.tsx (lines 1-71) provides general quality info
    - No vertical-specific tips (e.g., "Capture the green cross sign for pharmacies")

24. **Smart defaults/auto-fill** - MINIMAL
    - `isOpenNow` defaults to true if seedPoint not provided (ContributionFlow line 301)
    - No "default to last-used vertical" or other smart defaults visible
    - Time-based isOpenNow inference not automated

25. **Offline map tiles** - MISSING
    - Map uses leaflet tiles but no offline pre-caching mechanism

Now let me compile my findings into a comprehensive audit report. Based on my analysis of the codebase, I'll provide the feature audit:

## Comprehensive Feature Audit - African Data Layer React App

Based on my thorough examination of the codebase at `/Users/charlesvictormahouve/Documents/GitHub/africandatalayer`, here's the detailed status of all 30 features:

### **EXISTS / IMPLEMENTED:**

1. **SyncStatusBar** - EXISTS (FULL)
   - File: `/components/SyncStatusBar.tsx`
   - Always-visible sticky bar below header showing sync status (pending, failed, syncing, or synced)
   - Appears on all screens via App.tsx integration
   - Shows priorities: failed > offline+pending > syncing > all synced

2. **4-step wizard in ContributionFlow** - PARTIAL
   - File: `/components/Screens/ContributionFlow.tsx` (lines 1668-1687)
   - Shows 3 progress indicators with dots: Type → Photo → GPS (not full 4-step)
   - Not a traditional multi-step form; appears to be a single scrollable/tabbed form with progress dots
   - Visual indicators track completion of mandatory fields

3. **Assignment card on Home screen** - EXISTS (FULL)
   - File: `/components/Screens/Home.tsx` (lines 531-571)
   - "Active Assignment" widget showing zone label, assigned verticals, status, progress bar, and due date
   - Appears above daily progress widgets for agents with active assignments

4. **Batch capture mode** - EXISTS (FULL)
   - File: `/components/Screens/Home.tsx` (lines 421-430)
   - Long-press trigger (550ms) on contribute button enters batch mode
   - File: `/components/Screens/ContributionFlow.tsx` has `batchCapturedCount` state (line 296)
   - Batch mode tracked throughout contribution flow

5. **Daily progress widget on Home** - EXISTS (FULL)
   - File: `/components/DailyProgressWidget.tsx`
   - Shows: Submissions (today), Enrichments (today), Avg Quality %, Streak days
   - Progress bar showing daily target vs current submissions
   - Displayed on Home screen for authenticated agents (lines 575-582)

6. **Streak system widget** - EXISTS (FULL)
   - File: `/components/StreakTracker.tsx`
   - Visual streak display with 7 day dots (M T W T F S S)
   - Active days shown as filled boxes, inactive as "..."
   - Displays current streak count with flame icon

7. **Badge system** - EXISTS (FULL)
   - File: `/components/BadgeSystem.tsx`
   - 10 dynamic badges computed from PointEvents: First Steps, Explorer, Specialist, Quality Star, Night Owl, Rain Walker, Streak Master, Urban Validator, Data Champion, Trust Elite
   - Progress bars for unearned badges
   - Displayed in Profile screen

8. **XP popup with animation** - EXISTS (PARTIAL)
   - File: `/components/XPPopup.tsx`
   - Shows +XP breakdown (Base, Quality bonus, Streak bonus)
   - Level progress bar
   - Displays after submission capture
   - Limited animation (no explicit animation keyframes visible)

9. **Quality-weighted leaderboard** - EXISTS (FULL)
   - File: `/api/leaderboard/index.ts` (lines 92-103)
   - Ranking Score = contributions × average quality score
   - Calculates quality-weighted sort at backend
   - Integrated in `/components/Screens/Analytics.tsx` (line 418)

10. **Submission Queue screen** - EXISTS (FULL)
    - File: `/components/Screens/SubmissionQueue.tsx`
    - Dedicated screen showing: pending, failed, synced counts + storage usage
    - Lists failed items (with retry/edit/delete), pending items, rejected items
    - Force sync button and individual item retry functionality

11. **High-contrast mode** - EXISTS (FULL)
    - File: `/components/Screens/Settings.tsx` (lines 26-36)
    - Toggle in Settings screen adds/removes `high-contrast` class on document
    - Persisted in localStorage

12. **Agent location pin on map** - EXISTS (FULL)
    - File: `/components/Screens/HomeMap.tsx` (lines 68-100)
    - Blue dot with accuracy circle using Geolocation API
    - Watches position with high accuracy enabled

13. **Export interface** - EXISTS (PARTIAL)
    - File: `/components/ExportPanel.tsx`
    - Supports: CSV, GeoJSON, PDF export formats
    - Scope/filter selection visible
    - Does not show explicit confidence/GPS accuracy filters in UI

14. **Delta reports enhanced** - EXISTS (PARTIAL)
    - File: `/components/Screens/DeltaDashboard.tsx`
    - Period selection (52 weeks via limit param)
    - By-vertical breakdown (selectedVertical filter)
    - Trend data and delta breakdown charts
    - Export buttons via ExportPanel

15. **Client vertical dashboard** - EXISTS (FULL)
    - App.tsx shows client role has access to Screen.DELTA_DASHBOARD (line 109)
    - DeltaDashboard provides per-vertical view with stats and anomalies

---

### **MISSING / NOT IMPLEMENTED:**

16. **Photo overlay guides** - MISSING
    - No photo capture overlay frames or vertical-specific guide overlays found
    - No "Capture the green cross sign" type instructions

17. **GPS confidence indicator** - MISSING
    - No visual GPS accuracy bar/indicator during capture
    - GPS accuracy tracked internally but not displayed as UI indicator

18. **Quality preview before submit** - MISSING
    - No review step showing quality score breakdown (GPS accuracy, photo quality, completeness)
    - Submission goes directly from form to XP popup

19. **Voice input** - MISSING
    - No Web Speech API or speechSynthesis implementation found
    - No voice-to-text field inputs

20. **Proximity bar on map** - MISSING
    - No "Nearby: 3 pharmacies within 200m" proximity indicator
    - Map shows clustered points only, not proximity suggestions

21. **Level-up celebration** - MISSING
    - No full-screen level up overlay with animation
    - XPPopup shows XP gain but not level up events

22. **Step progress indicators (visual dots)** - PARTIAL
    - Found 3-step progress indicators (Type, Photo, GPS) in ContributionFlow
    - But no dots for a full multi-step flow (only 3 steps shown)

23. **Photo capture guidelines per vertical** - MISSING
    - QualityInfo.tsx (lines 1-71) provides general quality info
    - No vertical-specific tips (e.g., "Capture the green cross sign for pharmacies")

24. **Smart defaults/auto-fill** - MINIMAL
    - `isOpenNow` defaults to true if seedPoint not provided (ContributionFlow line 301)
    - No "default to last-used vertical" or other smart defaults visible
    - Time-based isOpenNow inference not automated

25. **Offline map tiles** - MISSING
    - Map uses leaflet tiles but no offline pre-caching mechanism
    - No service worker tile caching implementation

26. **Weekly target visualization** - MISSING
    - Daily progress widget exists but not weekly target ("This week: 34/50 target")
    - Only daily target shown (activeAssignment.pointsExpected)

27. **Admin split-panel review** - MISSING
    - AdminQueue.tsx has list + detail, but not confirmed as desktop split-panel layout

    - No low-risk filter + bulk approval flow visible

29. **Map heat map layer** - MISSING
    - No heatmap toggle for submission density
    - Analytics.tsx has a basic heatmap visual (lines 60-64) but no map layer toggle

    - No geofence polygon rendering on map for assigned zones

input.prompt:
Design a detailed implementation plan for all remaining UI features from the research document for the African Data Layer React app.

## CONSTRAINT
- Currently 9 serverless functions (api/health, api/auth/register, api/ai/search, api/user, api/submissions/[id], api/auth/[...auth], api/analytics, api/submissions, api/leaderboard). MAX 12 on Vercel Hobby plan.
- ALL new features must be frontend-only (no new API routes) unless absolutely necessary.
- Stack: React + Tailwind CSS + lucide-react icons + Leaflet maps, bilingual EN/FR

## ALREADY IMPLEMENTED (DO NOT PLAN):
1. SyncStatusBar - always-visible sync indicator
2. Assignment card on Home screen
3. Batch capture mode
4. Daily progress widget on Home
5. Streak tracker widget (7-day dots)
6. Badge system (10 badges computed from events)
7. XP popup (basic, post-submission)
8. Quality-weighted leaderboard
9. Submission Queue screen
10. High-contrast mode toggle
11. Agent location pin on map (blue dot)
12. Export panel (CSV/GeoJSON/PDF)
13. Delta reports (partial - has period selection and by-vertical)
14. Client vertical dashboard
15. Step progress indicators (3 steps: Type/Photo/GPS - need to add 4th "Details")

## FEATURES TO IMPLEMENT (grouped by priority):

### P0 - Critical Field Optimization:
A. **Photo overlay guides per vertical** - Camera viewfinder overlay showing vertical-specific frame and tip text (e.g., "Capture the green cross sign and full storefront" for pharmacy). Applied to the photo capture section in ContributionFlow.
B. **GPS confidence indicator** - Visual accuracy bar (●●●●○) showing GPS accuracy during capture in ContributionFlow, next to the GPS readout.
C. **Quality preview before submit** - Pre-submit quality breakdown card showing GPS accuracy score, photo quality score, completeness percentage, and estimated XP. Added before the submit button in ContributionFlow.

### P1 - Productivity:
D. **Smart defaults / auto-fill** - Default to last-used vertical (localStorage), time-based isOpenNow default (Yes 8am-6pm, No otherwise), remember last vertical selection.
E. **Voice input** - Microphone button next to text fields using Web Speech API (SpeechRecognition) with 'fr-CM' locale. Fallback to keyboard when API unavailable.
F. **Weekly target visualization** - "This week: 34/50 target" widget on Profile showing weekly progress bar and bonus XP info.
G. **Proximity bar on map** - Bottom overlay on HomeMap showing count of nearby POIs needing enrichment within 200m.

### P2 - Engagement:
H. **Level-up celebration** - Full-screen overlay animation when user levels up (displayed after XP popup when crossing level threshold). CSS animations: confetti effect, scale-in title.
I. **XP popup animations** - Add CSS keyframe animations to existing XPPopup: count-up animation for XP number, slide-in for breakdown items, pulse on level bar.
J. **Photo capture guidelines per vertical** - Context-specific tip text below the camera section in ContributionFlow showing 2-3 bullets of what to capture.
K. **Add "Details" as 4th step** - Update the step progress indicator to show 4 steps (Type → Photo → GPS → Details) instead of 3.

### P3 - Admin & Advanced:
L. **Admin split-panel for desktop** - Responsive layout for AdminQueue: on screens ≥1024px, show left panel (queue list) and right panel (detail view) side by side.
M. **Admin bulk approve** - Add checkbox selection to low-risk items in AdminQueue + "Approve All Low-Risk" bulk action button.
N. **Map heat map layer** - Toggle button on HomeMap to show/hide a leaflet-heat heatmap layer of submission density.
O. **Assignment zone overlay** - Render assignment zone polygons on the map (if zone geometry exists in CollectionAssignment data).

### P4 - Nice-to-have:
P. **Offline map tiles** - Service worker pre-caching of Leaflet tiles for Bonamoussadi area. Lower priority, complex.

## KEY FILES:
- /components/Screens/ContributionFlow.tsx - Photo capture, GPS, form fields, step indicators
- /components/Screens/HomeMap.tsx - Leaflet map component
- /components/Screens/Profile.tsx - User dashboard
- /components/Screens/AdminQueue.tsx - Admin review queue
- /components/XPPopup.tsx - XP reward display
- /components/Screens/Home.tsx - Home screen
- /components/Screens/Settings.tsx - Settings
- /index.html - Global CSS
- /shared/verticals.ts - Vertical definitions (colors, icons, labels)

## DESIGN REQUIREMENTS:
- Match existing Tailwind patterns: bg-white p-5 rounded-2xl border border-gray-100 shadow-sm
- Section labels: text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest
- Touch targets: minimum 48dp (h-12)
- All strings bilingual EN/FR using t() helper
- Colors: Navy #0f2b46, Terracotta #c86b4a, Forest Green #4c7c59, Gold #f4c317

Please provide a detailed implementation plan with:
1. Exact files to modify
2. What to add/change in each file
3. Dependencies between features
4. Estimated complexity (S/M/L)
5. Order of implementation to minimize conflicts

- /components/Screens/ContributionFlow.tsx - Photo capture, GPS, form fields, step indicators
- /components/Screens/HomeMap.tsx - Leaflet map component
- /components/Screens/Profile.tsx - User dashboard
- /components/Screens/AdminQueue.tsx - Admin review queue
- /components/XPPopup.tsx - XP reward display
- /components/Screens/Home.tsx - Home screen
- /components/Screens/Settings.tsx - Settings
- /index.html - Global CSS
- /shared/verticals.ts - Vertical definitions (colors, icons, labels)

## DESIGN REQUIREMENTS:
- Match existing Tailwind patterns: bg-white p-5 rounded-2xl border border-gray-100 shadow-sm
- Section labels: text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest
- Touch targets: minimum 48dp (h-12)
- All strings bilingual EN/FR using t() helper
- Colors: Navy #0f2b46, Terracotta #c86b4a, Forest Green #4c7c59, Gold #f4c317

Please provide a detailed implementation plan with:
1. Exact files to modify
2. What to add/change in each file
3. Dependencies between features
4. Estimated complexity (S/M/L)
5. Order of implementation to minimize conflicts

content.text:
I now have a comprehensive understanding of the codebase. Here is the detailed implementation plan.

---

## Detailed Implementation Plan: Remaining UI Features

### Architecture Overview

The app is a single-page React application with Tailwind CSS, using lazy-loaded screen components routed via `App.tsx`. All state is managed locally per component. The bilingual pattern is `t('English', 'French')`. The design system uses `bg-white p-5 rounded-2xl border border-gray-100 shadow-sm` cards with `text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest` section labels. There are 9 serverless functions; **no new API routes will be added**.

The step indicators in ContributionFlow already have 4 steps (Type/Photo/GPS/Details) as of the latest code at line 1668, so feature **K** is already implemented. I will exclude it from the plan.

---

### Implementation Order (sequenced to minimize conflicts)

Each feature is tagged with the primary file(s) it touches, complexity, and dependencies.

---

#### Phase 1: ContributionFlow Enhancements (P0 + P1 partial)

These all modify `/components/Screens/ContributionFlow.tsx` and should be done sequentially to avoid merge conflicts.

**1. Feature B: GPS Confidence Indicator** [Size: S]

- **File:** `/components/Screens/ContributionFlow.tsx`
- **What to change:**
  - In the `useEffect` at line 385 that calls `navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition`, switch to `watchPosition` and store `coords.accuracy` in a new state variable `gpsAccuracy: number | null`.
  - In the `getCurrentLocation` promise (line 513), also return and store `accuracy`.
  - In `renderCommonLocationBlock()` (line 1010), add a visual accuracy bar below the GPS readout:
    ```
    ●●●●○  (filled dots based on accuracy thresholds)
    ```
    Thresholds: <=10m = 5 dots (excellent), <=25m = 4, <=50m = 3, <=100m = 2, >100m = 1.
  - Render as a row of 5 circles: `<div className="flex items-center gap-1">` with filled circles as `bg-[#4c7c59]` and empty as `bg-gray-200`.
  - Add bilingual accuracy label: `t('Excellent', 'Excellent')` / `t('Good', 'Bon')` / `t('Fair', 'Moyen')` / `t('Poor', 'Faible')` / `t('Very Poor', 'Tres faible')`.
- **Dependencies:** None.

**2. Feature A: Photo Overlay Guides per Vertical** [Size: M]

- **File:** `/components/Screens/ContributionFlow.tsx`
- **New constant:** Add a `PHOTO_GUIDE_CONFIG` record keyed by vertical ID at the top of the file (after line 54), containing `{ frameLabel: { en, fr }, tips: Array<{ en, fr }> }` for each vertical. Example:
  - `pharmacy`: `"Capture the green cross sign and full storefront"` / `"Capturez la croix verte et la devanture complete"`
  - `mobile_money`: `"Show the provider logo and agent booth"` / `"Montrez le logo du fournisseur et le stand de l'agent"`
  - `fuel_station`: `"Capture the brand sign and pump area"` / `"Capturez l'enseigne et la zone des pompes"`
  - etc.
- **What to change in `renderPhotoBlock()`** (line 1058):
  - When `!photoPreview` (empty viewfinder state), overlay a semi-transparent guide frame inside the `aspect-square` div. Use `absolute inset-4 border-2 border-dashed border-white/60 rounded-xl` with centered tip text from `PHOTO_GUIDE_CONFIG[vertical]`.
  - Below the photo block (after line 1091), render 2-3 bullet tips from `PHOTO_GUIDE_CONFIG[vertical].tips` in a `text-xs text-gray-500 space-y-1` div. This also covers **Feature J (Photo capture guidelines per vertical)**.
- **Dependencies:** None. This also implements Feature J.

**3. Feature J: Photo Capture Guidelines per Vertical** [Size: S -- covered by Feature A]

Merged into Feature A above. The tip bullets below the camera section come from the same `PHOTO_GUIDE_CONFIG` constant.

**4. Feature D: Smart Defaults / Auto-fill** [Size: S]

- **File:** `/components/Screens/ContributionFlow.tsx`
- **What to change:**
  - On mount (in existing `useEffect` or a new one), read `localStorage.getItem('adl_last_vertical')`. If it exists and is a valid vertical ID, set it as the default `vertical` state (line ~298, `useState<Vertical>('pharmacy')`). Change the default to: `() => { const saved = localStorage.getItem('adl_last_vertical'); return saved && saved in VERTICALS ? saved as Vertical : 'pharmacy'; }`.
  - On successful submission (in `handleSubmit` success path), write `localStorage.setItem('adl_last_vertical', vertical)`.
  - For `isOpenNow` default: change the initial state (line ~303) to a computed value: `() => { const hour = new Date().getHours(); return hour >= 8 && hour < 18; }`.
- **Dependencies:** None.

**5. Feature C: Quality Preview Before Submit** [Size: M]

- **File:** `/components/Screens/ContributionFlow.tsx`
- **What to change:**
  - Add a new render function `renderQualityPreview()` that computes and displays:
    - **GPS accuracy score**: Based on `gpsAccuracy` state from Feature B. Map accuracy to 0-100 scale (<=10m=100, <=25m=80, <=50m=60, <=100m=40, else 20).
    - **Photo quality score**: 100 if `photoPreview` exists, 0 otherwise. Can add bonus if JPEG EXIF was preserved (check `photoFile?.type`).
    - **Completeness %**: Count filled required fields for the current vertical against total required fields. Use `VERTICALS[vertical].createRequiredFields` or check each field's state.
    - **Estimated XP**: `BASE_EVENT_XP` (5) + quality bonus estimate (0-3 based on GPS+photo scores) + streak bonus placeholder.
  - Render as a card (`bg-white p-4 rounded-2xl border border-gray-100 shadow-sm`) with a 2x2 grid of score items, placed between the form fields and the submit button. Insert it in the JSX at line ~1749 (after `{isEnrichMode ? renderEnrichFields() : renderCreateFields()}`).
  - Each score item: colored circle indicator + label + value.
  - Import `BASE_EVENT_XP` from `../../shared/xp`.
- **Dependencies:** Feature B (GPS accuracy state).

**6. Feature E: Voice Input** [Size: M]

- **File:** `/components/Screens/ContributionFlow.tsx`
- **New component (inline):** Create a `VoiceMicButton` component within the same file (or extract to `/components/shared/VoiceMicButton.tsx`).
  - Check `window.SpeechRecognition || window.webkitSpeechRecognition` availability.
  - Props: `onResult: (text: string) => void`, `language: 'en' | 'fr'`, `disabled?: boolean`.
  - On click, start recognition with `lang: language === 'fr' ? 'fr-CM' : 'en'`.
  - Render: `Mic` icon from lucide-react, `h-12 w-12` button, red pulse animation when listening.
  - Fallback: When API unavailable, do not render (graceful degradation).
- **Where to add:** Next to each text `<input>` field in `renderCreateFields()` and `renderEnrichFieldInput()`. Wrap input+mic in a `flex` row.
- **Dependencies:** None.

---

#### Phase 2: Profile & Map Features (P1 remaining + P3 map)

**7. Feature F: Weekly Target Visualization** [Size: S]

- **File:** `/components/Screens/Profile.tsx`
- **What to change:**
  - The `pointsThisWeek` computation already exists (line 149). Add a constant `WEEKLY_TARGET = 50`.
  - After the existing "This Week" stat card (line 459-468), add a new full-width card:
    ```
    "This week: {pointsThisWeek}/{WEEKLY_TARGET} target"
    ```
    With a progress bar (`h-2 rounded-full bg-gray-200` outer, `bg-gradient-to-r from-[#0f2b46] to-[#4c7c59]` inner, width = `Math.min(100, (pointsThisWeek/WEEKLY_TARGET)*100)%`).
  - Add bonus XP info text: `t('Complete 50 this week for a 20 XP bonus!', 'Completez 50 cette semaine pour un bonus de 20 XP!')`.
- **Dependencies:** None.

**8. Feature G: Proximity Bar on Map** [Size: M]

- **File:** `/components/Screens/HomeMap.tsx`
- **What to change:**
  - Add props: `nearbyEnrichCount?: number` (computed by parent).
  - Render a bottom overlay bar (absolute, bottom-4, inset-x-4, z-20) showing: `"{count} POIs need enrichment within 200m"` / `"{count} POIs necessitent un enrichissement dans 200m"`. Style: `bg-white/95 backdrop-blur rounded-xl p-3 border border-gray-100 shadow-sm`.
  - Only show when count > 0.
- **File:** `/components/Screens/Home.tsx`
  - Compute `nearbyEnrichCount` using agent geolocation and `points` array. Filter points within 200m using Haversine distance and that have enrichable gaps (check if point has missing fields for its vertical).
  - Pass as prop to `HomeMap`.
- **Dependencies:** None, but benefits from understanding the geolocation already used in `AgentLocationMarker`.

**9. Feature N: Map Heat Map Layer** [Size: M]

- **File:** `/components/Screens/HomeMap.tsx`
- **What to change:**
  - Add a toggle button in the top-right area of the map overlay (next to the existing info card). Icon: `Flame` or `Layers` from lucide-react.
  - When toggled on, render a heatmap layer using `leaflet.heat`. This requires dynamically importing `leaflet.heat` (or `L.heatLayer`).
  - **NPM dependency needed:** `leaflet.heat` (add to `package.json`). Alternatively, load via CDN script tag to avoid adding a dependency. The simpler approach: use a dynamic import of `leaflet.heat` from a CDN via `import()`.
  - Convert `mapPointGroups` to `[lat, lng, intensity]` array and pass to `L.heatLayer()`.
  - Use a `useMap()` hook inside a child component `HeatmapLayer` to add/remove the layer.
- **Dependencies:** Requires `leaflet.heat` package or CDN load.

**10. Feature O: Assignment Zone Overlay** [Size: S]

- **File:** `/components/Screens/HomeMap.tsx`
- **What to change:**
  - Add prop: `assignmentZones?: Array<{ label: string; polygon: [number, number][] }>`.
  - Render each zone as a react-leaflet `<Polygon>` with semi-transparent fill (`fillColor: '#c86b4a', fillOpacity: 0.1, color: '#c86b4a', weight: 2`).
  - Add a `Tooltip` with the zone label.
- **File:** `/components/Screens/Home.tsx`
  - Extract zone geometry from `assignments` state (if `CollectionAssignment` has a `zoneGeometry` field). Pass to `HomeMap`.
- **Dependencies:** Depends on `CollectionAssignment` having zone geometry data. If not present, this is a no-op (renders nothing).

---

#### Phase 3: XP & Engagement (P2)

**11. Feature I: XP Popup Animations** [Size: S]

- **File:** `/components/XPPopup.tsx`
- **File:** `/index.html` (add CSS keyframes in `<style>` block)
- **What to change in `index.html`:**
  - Add keyframes:
    ```css
    @keyframes xp-count-up { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px) scale(0.8); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0) scale(1); } }
    @keyframes xp-slide-in { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateX(-20px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(0); } }
    @keyframes xp-pulse { 0%, 100% { transform: scaleX(1); } 50% { transform: scaleX(1.02); } }
    ```
- **What to change in `XPPopup.tsx`:**
  - Add `style={{ animation: 'xp-count-up 0.6s ease-out' }}` to the `+{totalXp} XP` heading (line 41).
  - Add staggered `xp-slide-in` animations to the three breakdown cards (Base/Quality/Streak) with increasing `animation-delay`.
  - Add `xp-pulse` to the level progress bar.
- **Dependencies:** None.

**12. Feature H: Level-Up Celebration** [Size: M]

- **File:** New file `/components/LevelUpCelebration.tsx`
- **File:** `/components/Screens/ContributionFlow.tsx`
- **File:** `/index.html` (add confetti keyframes)
- **Design:**
  - Create `LevelUpCelebration` component: full-screen overlay (`fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-[#0f2b46]/90 backdrop-blur flex items-center justify-center`).
  - Content: large level number with `scale-in` animation, "Level Up!" text, confetti particles (pure CSS: 20-30 `<div>` elements with randomized `animation-delay`, `animation-duration`, colors from the palette, falling from top with rotation).
  - Auto-dismiss after 3 seconds or on tap.
  - Props: `level: number`, `language: 'en' | 'fr'`, `onDismiss: () => void`.
- **Integration in ContributionFlow:**
  - Define level thresholds: `const XP_PER_LEVEL = 100;` and compute `level = Math.floor(totalXp / XP_PER_LEVEL) + 1`.
  - After submission success, compare previous XP level to new XP level. If crossed threshold, set `showLevelUp = true`.
  - Render `<LevelUpCelebration>` conditionally before `<XPPopup>`. Show celebration first, then transition to XPPopup on dismiss.
  - This requires tracking `previousXp` -- read from `localStorage.getItem('adl_user_xp')` and update after each submission.
- **Dependencies:** Feature I (animation patterns established first).
- **CSS keyframes in `index.html`:**
  ```css
  @keyframes confetti-fall { 0% { transform: translateY(-100vh) rotate(0deg); opacity: 1; } 100% { transform: translateY(100vh) rotate(720deg); opacity: 0; } }
  @keyframes level-scale-in { 0% { transform: scale(0); opacity: 0; } 60% { transform: scale(1.2); } 100% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; } }
  ```

---

#### Phase 4: Admin Enhancements (P3)

**13. Feature L: Admin Split-Panel for Desktop** [Size: M]

- **File:** `/components/Screens/AdminQueue.tsx`
- **What to change:**
  - The current layout is a single column: header, controls, detail panel, then list. All inside `<div className="p-4 space-y-4">`.
  - Restructure the main content area (line 719, `<div className="p-4 space-y-4">`) to use a responsive split layout:
    - Wrap the controls section (risk filter, schema guard, assignment planner) in a top area that spans full width.
    - Below that, create a `<div className="lg:flex lg:gap-4">` container.
    - Left panel (`lg:w-[380px] lg:shrink-0 lg:overflow-y-auto`): the queue list (filteredGroups map at line 1180).
    - Right panel (`lg:flex-1 lg:overflow-y-auto`): the detail view (selectedGroup block at line 992).
    - On mobile (`< lg`), keep current stacked layout: detail above list.
  - Add `lg:h-[calc(100vh-200px)]` or similar to both panels for scroll containment on desktop.
  - The detail panel already has a close button (X); on desktop it can remain but the panel stays visible with a "select an item" placeholder when nothing is selected.
- **Dependencies:** None.

**14. Feature M: Admin Bulk Approve with Checkboxes** [Size: M]

- **File:** `/components/Screens/AdminQueue.tsx`
- **What to change:**
  - The bulk approve functionality already exists (line 562, `handleBulkApproveLowRisk`). It approves ALL low-risk pending items.
  - Enhance it with selective checkboxes:
    - Add state: `selectedForBulk: Set<string>` (point IDs).
    - Add a checkbox to each queue list item (line 1190) -- a `<div>` with a checkmark icon that toggles membership in `selectedForBulk`.
    - Add a "Select All Low-Risk" toggle button.
    - Modify `handleBulkApproveLowRisk` to only approve items in `selectedForBulk` if any are selected, otherwise fall back to all low-risk.
    - Show selected count in the bulk approve button label: `t('Approve Selected (N)', 'Approuver selectionnes (N)')`.
- **Dependencies:** Feature L (the checkbox UI works better with the split panel, but is not strictly required).

---

#### Phase 5: Nice-to-Have (P4)

**15. Feature P: Offline Map Tiles** [Size: L]

- **File:** New file `/public/sw.js` (service worker)
- **File:** `/index.html` or `/index.tsx` (service worker registration)
- **What to change:**
  - Create a service worker that intercepts tile requests matching `https://{s}.tile.openstreetmap.org/{z}/{x}/{y}.png`.
  - On install, pre-cache tiles for the Bonamoussadi area at zoom levels 14-17 (the area defined by `BONAMOUSSADI_CENTER` and the geofence bounds).
  - Use Cache API with a "tiles-v1" cache name.
  - Strategy: cache-first for tiles, network-first for API calls.
  - Registration: add `navigator.serviceWorker.register('/sw.js')` in the app entry.
  - Tile count estimation: Bonamoussadi is a small area. At zoom 14-17, approximately 100-400 tiles. Pre-cache on first load when online.
- **Dependencies:** None, but this is complex and lower priority. Consider deferring.
- **Risk:** Service worker caching can cause stale tile issues. Needs a versioned cache and clear strategy.

---

### Summary Table

| # | Feature | Files to Modify | Size | Phase | Dependencies |
|---|---------|----------------|------|-------|-------------|
| 1 | B: GPS Confidence Indicator | ContributionFlow.tsx | S | 1 | None |
| 2 | A+J: Photo Overlay Guides + Guidelines | ContributionFlow.tsx | M | 1 | None |
| 3 | D: Smart Defaults | ContributionFlow.tsx | S | 1 | None |
| 4 | C: Quality Preview Before Submit | ContributionFlow.tsx | M | 1 | Feature B |
| 5 | E: Voice Input | ContributionFlow.tsx (+ optional new component) | M | 1 | None |
| 6 | F: Weekly Target Visualization | Profile.tsx | S | 2 | None |
| 7 | G: Proximity Bar on Map | HomeMap.tsx, Home.tsx | M | 2 | None |
| 8 | N: Map Heat Map Layer | HomeMap.tsx, package.json | M | 2 | leaflet.heat dep |
| 9 | O: Assignment Zone Overlay | HomeMap.tsx, Home.tsx | S | 2 | Zone geometry data |
| 10 | I: XP Popup Animations | XPPopup.tsx, index.html | S | 3 | None |
| 11 | H: Level-Up Celebration | New LevelUpCelebration.tsx, ContributionFlow.tsx, index.html | M | 3 | Feature I |
| 12 | L: Admin Split-Panel | AdminQueue.tsx | M | 4 | None |
| 13 | M: Admin Bulk Checkboxes | AdminQueue.tsx | M | 4 | Feature L (soft) |
| 14 | P: Offline Map Tiles | New sw.js, index.html | L | 5 | None |

### Key Constraints Respected

- **Zero new API routes**: All features are frontend-only. GPS accuracy comes from `navigator.geolocation`. Quality scores are computed client-side. Level thresholds use localStorage. Voice uses Web Speech API. Heatmap uses existing point data.
- **Bilingual**: Every user-visible string uses `t('English', 'French')`.
- **12 serverless function limit**: Unchanged at 9.
- **Feature K already done**: The 4-step indicator (Type/Photo/GPS/Details) is already in the code at line 1668.

### Potential Challenges

1. **Feature E (Voice Input)**: `SpeechRecognition` browser support is inconsistent (no Firefox desktop, limited Safari). The `fr-CM` locale may not be available on all devices -- fallback to `fr-FR` then `fr`.
2. **Feature N (Heatmap)**: `leaflet.heat` needs to be added as a dependency or loaded from CDN. It is not typed, so a `declare module 'leaflet.heat'` stub may be needed.
3. **Feature H (Level-Up)**: Requires knowing the user's previous XP total. Using localStorage is the simplest approach but could get out of sync with server state. Accept this trade-off for a frontend-only solution.
4. **Feature P (Offline Tiles)**: Service workers are complex to debug. Tile pre-caching could consume significant bandwidth on first load. Suggest making it opt-in via Settings.

### Critical Files for Implementation

- `/Users/charlesvictormahouve/Documents/GitHub/africandatalayer/components/Screens/ContributionFlow.tsx` - Central file for 5 features (A, B, C, D, E); contains photo capture, GPS, form fields, step indicators, and submit flow
- `/Users/charlesvictormahouve/Documents/GitHub/africandatalayer/components/Screens/HomeMap.tsx` - Map component for features G, N, O; add proximity bar, heatmap layer, and zone polygons
- `/Users/charlesvictormahouve/Documents/GitHub/africandatalayer/components/XPPopup.tsx` - XP display for feature I animations; entry point for level-up celebration trigger
- `/Users/charlesvictormahouve/Documents/GitHub/africandatalayer/components/Screens/AdminQueue.tsx` - Admin review queue for features L and M; restructure layout and add bulk selection
- `/Users/charlesvictormahouve/Documents/GitHub/africandatalayer/index.html` - Global CSS keyframes for features H and I; animation definitions used across components

toolUseResult.prompt:
Design a detailed implementation plan for all remaining UI features from the research document for the African Data Layer React app.

## CONSTRAINT
- Currently 9 serverless functions (api/health, api/auth/register, api/ai/search, api/user, api/submissions/[id], api/auth/[...auth], api/analytics, api/submissions, api/leaderboard). MAX 12 on Vercel Hobby plan.
- ALL new features must be frontend-only (no new API routes) unless absolutely necessary.
- Stack: React + Tailwind CSS + lucide-react icons + Leaflet maps, bilingual EN/FR

## ALREADY IMPLEMENTED (DO NOT PLAN):
1. SyncStatusBar - always-visible sync indicator
2. Assignment card on Home screen
3. Batch capture mode
4. Daily progress widget on Home
5. Streak tracker widget (7-day dots)
6. Badge system (10 badges computed from events)
7. XP popup (basic, post-submission)
8. Quality-weighted leaderboard
9. Submission Queue screen
10. High-contrast mode toggle
11. Agent location pin on map (blue dot)
12. Export panel (CSV/GeoJSON/PDF)
13. Delta reports (partial - has period selection and by-vertical)
14. Client vertical dashboard
15. Step progress indicators (3 steps: Type/Photo/GPS - need to add 4th "Details")

## FEATURES TO IMPLEMENT (grouped by priority):

### P0 - Critical Field Optimization:
A. **Photo overlay guides per vertical** - Camera viewfinder overlay showing vertical-specific frame and tip text (e.g., "Capture the green cross sign and full storefront" for pharmacy). Applied to the photo capture section in ContributionFlow.
B. **GPS confidence indicator** - Visual accuracy bar (●●●●○) showing GPS accuracy during capture in ContributionFlow, next to the GPS readout.
C. **Quality preview before submit** - Pre-submit quality breakdown card showing GPS accuracy score, photo quality score, completeness percentage, and estimated XP. Added before the submit button in ContributionFlow.

### P1 - Productivity:
D. **Smart defaults / auto-fill** - Default to last-used vertical (localStorage), time-based isOpenNow default (Yes 8am-6pm, No otherwise), remember last vertical selection.
E. **Voice input** - Microphone button next to text fields using Web Speech API (SpeechRecognition) with 'fr-CM' locale. Fallback to keyboard when API unavailable.
F. **Weekly target visualization** - "This week: 34/50 target" widget on Profile showing weekly progress bar and bonus XP info.
G. **Proximity bar on map** - Bottom overlay on HomeMap showing count of nearby POIs needing enrichment within 200m.

### P2 - Engagement:
H. **Level-up celebration** - Full-screen overlay animation when user levels up (displayed after XP popup when crossing level threshold). CSS animations: confetti effect, scale-in title.
I. **XP popup animations** - Add CSS keyframe animations to existing XPPopup: count-up animation for XP number, slide-in for breakdown items, pulse on level bar.
J. **Photo capture guidelines per vertical** - Context-specific tip text below the camera section in ContributionFlow showing 2-3 bullets of what to capture.
K. **Add "Details" as 4th step** - Update the step progress indicator to show 4 steps (Type → Photo → GPS → Details) instead of 3.

### P3 - Admin & Advanced:
L. **Admin split-panel for desktop** - Responsive layout for AdminQueue: on screens ≥1024px, show left panel (queue list) and right panel (detail view) side by side.
M. **Admin bulk approve** - Add checkbox selection to low-risk items in AdminQueue + "Approve All Low-Risk" bulk action button.
N. **Map heat map layer** - Toggle button on HomeMap to show/hide a leaflet-heat heatmap layer of submission density.
O. **Assignment zone overlay** - Render assignment zone polygons on the map (if zone geometry exists in CollectionAssignment data).

### P4 - Nice-to-have:
P. **Offline map tiles** - Service worker pre-caching of Leaflet tiles for Bonamoussadi area. Lower priority, complex.

## KEY FILES:
- /components/Screens/ContributionFlow.tsx - Photo capture, GPS, form fields, step indicators
- /components/Screens/HomeMap.tsx - Leaflet map component
- /components/Screens/Profile.tsx - User dashboard
- /components/Screens/AdminQueue.tsx - Admin review queue
- /components/XPPopup.tsx - XP reward display
- /components/Screens/Home.tsx - Home screen
- /components/Screens/Settings.tsx - Settings
- /index.html - Global CSS
- /shared/verticals.ts - Vertical definitions (colors, icons, labels)

## DESIGN REQUIREMENTS:
- Match existing Tailwind patterns: bg-white p-5 rounded-2xl border border-gray-100 shadow-sm
- Section labels: text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest
- Touch targets: minimum 48dp (h-12)
- All strings bilingual EN/FR using t() helper
- Colors: Navy #0f2b46, Terracotta #c86b4a, Forest Green #4c7c59, Gold #f4c317

Please provide a detailed implementation plan with:

4. Estimated complexity (S/M/L)
5. Order of implementation to minimize conflicts

content.text:
I now have a comprehensive understanding of the codebase. Here is the detailed implementation plan.

---

## Detailed Implementation Plan: Remaining UI Features

### Architecture Overview

The app is a single-page React application with Tailwind CSS, using lazy-loaded screen components routed via `App.tsx`. All state is managed locally per component. The bilingual pattern is `t('English', 'French')`. The design system uses `bg-white p-5 rounded-2xl border border-gray-100 shadow-sm` cards with `text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest` section labels. There are 9 serverless functions; **no new API routes will be added**.

The step indicators in ContributionFlow already have 4 steps (Type/Photo/GPS/Details) as of the latest code at line 1668, so feature **K** is already implemented. I will exclude it from the plan.

---

### Implementation Order (sequenced to minimize conflicts)

Each feature is tagged with the primary file(s) it touches, complexity, and dependencies.

---

#### Phase 1: ContributionFlow Enhancements (P0 + P1 partial)

These all modify `/components/Screens/ContributionFlow.tsx` and should be done sequentially to avoid merge conflicts.

**1. Feature B: GPS Confidence Indicator** [Size: S]

- **File:** `/components/Screens/ContributionFlow.tsx`
- **What to change:**
  - In the `useEffect` at line 385 that calls `navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition`, switch to `watchPosition` and store `coords.accuracy` in a new state variable `gpsAccuracy: number | null`.
  - In the `getCurrentLocation` promise (line 513), also return and store `accuracy`.
  - In `renderCommonLocationBlock()` (line 1010), add a visual accuracy bar below the GPS readout:
    ```
    ●●●●○  (filled dots based on accuracy thresholds)
    ```
    Thresholds: <=10m = 5 dots (excellent), <=25m = 4, <=50m = 3, <=100m = 2, >100m = 1.
  - Render as a row of 5 circles: `<div className="flex items-center gap-1">` with filled circles as `bg-[#4c7c59]` and empty as `bg-gray-200`.
  - Add bilingual accuracy label: `t('Excellent', 'Excellent')` / `t('Good', 'Bon')` / `t('Fair', 'Moyen')` / `t('Poor', 'Faible')` / `t('Very Poor', 'Tres faible')`.
- **Dependencies:** None.

**2. Feature A: Photo Overlay Guides per Vertical** [Size: M]

- **File:** `/components/Screens/ContributionFlow.tsx`
- **New constant:** Add a `PHOTO_GUIDE_CONFIG` record keyed by vertical ID at the top of the file (after line 54), containing `{ frameLabel: { en, fr }, tips: Array<{ en, fr }> }` for each vertical. Example:
  - `pharmacy`: `"Capture the green cross sign and full storefront"` / `"Capturez la croix verte et la devanture complete"`
  - `mobile_money`: `"Show the provider logo and agent booth"` / `"Montrez le logo du fournisseur et le stand de l'agent"`
  - `fuel_station`: `"Capture the brand sign and pump area"` / `"Capturez l'enseigne et la zone des pompes"`
  - etc.
- **What to change in `renderPhotoBlock()`** (line 1058):
  - When `!photoPreview` (empty viewfinder state), overlay a semi-transparent guide frame inside the `aspect-square` div. Use `absolute inset-4 border-2 border-dashed border-white/60 rounded-xl` with centered tip text from `PHOTO_GUIDE_CONFIG[vertical]`.
  - Below the photo block (after line 1091), render 2-3 bullet tips from `PHOTO_GUIDE_CONFIG[vertical].tips` in a `text-xs text-gray-500 space-y-1` div. This also covers **Feature J (Photo capture guidelines per vertical)**.
- **Dependencies:** None. This also implements Feature J.

**3. Feature J: Photo Capture Guidelines per Vertical** [Size: S -- covered by Feature A]

Merged into Feature A above. The tip bullets below the camera section come from the same `PHOTO_GUIDE_CONFIG` constant.

**4. Feature D: Smart Defaults / Auto-fill** [Size: S]

- **File:** `/components/Screens/ContributionFlow.tsx`
- **What to change:**
  - On mount (in existing `useEffect` or a new one), read `localStorage.getItem('adl_last_vertical')`. If it exists and is a valid vertical ID, set it as the default `vertical` state (line ~298, `useState<Vertical>('pharmacy')`). Change the default to: `() => { const saved = localStorage.getItem('adl_last_vertical'); return saved && saved in VERTICALS ? saved as Vertical : 'pharmacy'; }`.
  - On successful submission (in `handleSubmit` success path), write `localStorage.setItem('adl_last_vertical', vertical)`.
  - For `isOpenNow` default: change the initial state (line ~303) to a computed value: `() => { const hour = new Date().getHours(); return hour >= 8 && hour < 18; }`.
- **Dependencies:** None.

**5. Feature C: Quality Preview Before Submit** [Size: M]

- **File:** `/components/Screens/ContributionFlow.tsx`
- **What to change:**
  - Add a new render function `renderQualityPreview()` that computes and displays:
    - **GPS accuracy score**: Based on `gpsAccuracy` state from Feature B. Map accuracy to 0-100 scale (<=10m=100, <=25m=80, <=50m=60, <=100m=40, else 20).
    - **Photo quality score**: 100 if `photoPreview` exists, 0 otherwise. Can add bonus if JPEG EXIF was preserved (check `photoFile?.type`).
    - **Completeness %**: Count filled required fields for the current vertical against total required fields. Use `VERTICALS[vertical].createRequiredFields` or check each field's state.
    - **Estimated XP**: `BASE_EVENT_XP` (5) + quality bonus estimate (0-3 based on GPS+photo scores) + streak bonus placeholder.
  - Render as a card (`bg-white p-4 rounded-2xl border border-gray-100 shadow-sm`) with a 2x2 grid of score items, placed between the form fields and the submit button. Insert it in the JSX at line ~1749 (after `{isEnrichMode ? renderEnrichFields() : renderCreateFields()}`).
  - Each score item: colored circle indicator + label + value.
  - Import `BASE_EVENT_XP` from `../../shared/xp`.
- **Dependencies:** Feature B (GPS accuracy state).

**6. Feature E: Voice Input** [Size: M]

- **File:** `/components/Screens/ContributionFlow.tsx`
- **New component (inline):** Create a `VoiceMicButton` component within the same file (or extract to `/components/shared/VoiceMicButton.tsx`).
  - Check `window.SpeechRecognition || window.webkitSpeechRecognition` availability.
  - Props: `onResult: (text: string) => void`, `language: 'en' | 'fr'`, `disabled?: boolean`.
  - On click, start recognition with `lang: language === 'fr' ? 'fr-CM' : 'en'`.
  - Render: `Mic` icon from lucide-react, `h-12 w-12` button, red pulse animation when listening.
  - Fallback: When API unavailable, do not render (graceful degradation).
- **Where to add:** Next to each text `<input>` field in `renderCreateFields()` and `renderEnrichFieldInput()`. Wrap input+mic in a `flex` row.
- **Dependencies:** None.

---

#### Phase 2: Profile & Map Features (P1 remaining + P3 map)

**7. Feature F: Weekly Target Visualization** [Size: S]

- **File:** `/components/Screens/Profile.tsx`
- **What to change:**
  - The `pointsThisWeek` computation already exists (line 149). Add a constant `WEEKLY_TARGET = 50`.
  - After the existing "This Week" stat card (line 459-468), add a new full-width card:
    ```
    "This week: {pointsThisWeek}/{WEEKLY_TARGET} target"
    ```
    With a progress bar (`h-2 rounded-full bg-gray-200` outer, `bg-gradient-to-r from-[#0f2b46] to-[#4c7c59]` inner, width = `Math.min(100, (pointsThisWeek/WEEKLY_TARGET)*100)%`).
  - Add bonus XP info text: `t('Complete 50 this week for a 20 XP bonus!', 'Completez 50 cette semaine pour un bonus de 20 XP!')`.
- **Dependencies:** None.

**8. Feature G: Proximity Bar on Map** [Size: M]

- **File:** `/components/Screens/HomeMap.tsx`
- **What to change:**
  - Add props: `nearbyEnrichCount?: number` (computed by parent).
  - Render a bottom overlay bar (absolute, bottom-4, inset-x-4, z-20) showing: `"{count} POIs need enrichment within 200m"` / `"{count} POIs necessitent un enrichissement dans 200m"`. Style: `bg-white/95 backdrop-blur rounded-xl p-3 border border-gray-100 shadow-sm`.
  - Only show when count > 0.
- **File:** `/components/Screens/Home.tsx`
  - Compute `nearbyEnrichCount` using agent geolocation and `points` array. Filter points within 200m using Haversine distance and that have enrichable gaps (check if point has missing fields for its vertical).
  - Pass as prop to `HomeMap`.
- **Dependencies:** None, but benefits from understanding the geolocation already used in `AgentLocationMarker`.

**9. Feature N: Map Heat Map Layer** [Size: M]

- **File:** `/components/Screens/HomeMap.tsx`
- **What to change:**
  - Add a toggle button in the top-right area of the map overlay (next to the existing info card). Icon: `Flame` or `Layers` from lucide-react.
  - When toggled on, render a heatmap layer using `leaflet.heat`. This requires dynamically importing `leaflet.heat` (or `L.heatLayer`).
  - **NPM dependency needed:** `leaflet.heat` (add to `package.json`). Alternatively, load via CDN script tag to avoid adding a dependency. The simpler approach: use a dynamic import of `leaflet.heat` from a CDN via `import()`.
  - Convert `mapPointGroups` to `[lat, lng, intensity]` array and pass to `L.heatLayer()`.
  - Use a `useMap()` hook inside a child component `HeatmapLayer` to add/remove the layer.
- **Dependencies:** Requires `leaflet.heat` package or CDN load.

**10. Feature O: Assignment Zone Overlay** [Size: S]

- **File:** `/components/Screens/HomeMap.tsx`
- **What to change:**
  - Add prop: `assignmentZones?: Array<{ label: string; polygon: [number, number][] }>`.
  - Render each zone as a react-leaflet `<Polygon>` with semi-transparent fill (`fillColor: '#c86b4a', fillOpacity: 0.1, color: '#c86b4a', weight: 2`).
  - Add a `Tooltip` with the zone label.
- **File:** `/components/Screens/Home.tsx`
  - Extract zone geometry from `assignments` state (if `CollectionAssignment` has a `zoneGeometry` field). Pass to `HomeMap`.
- **Dependencies:** Depends on `CollectionAssignment` having zone geometry data. If not present, this is a no-op (renders nothing).

---

#### Phase 3: XP & Engagement (P2)

**11. Feature I: XP Popup Animations** [Size: S]

- **File:** `/components/XPPopup.tsx`
- **File:** `/index.html` (add CSS keyframes in `<style>` block)
- **What to change in `index.html`:**
  - Add keyframes:
    ```css
    @keyframes xp-count-up { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px) scale(0.8); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0) scale(1); } }
    @keyframes xp-slide-in { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateX(-20px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(0); } }
    @keyframes xp-pulse { 0%, 100% { transform: scaleX(1); } 50% { transform: scaleX(1.02); } }
    ```
- **What to change in `XPPopup.tsx`:**
  - Add `style={{ animation: 'xp-count-up 0.6s ease-out' }}` to the `+{totalXp} XP` heading (line 41).
  - Add staggered `xp-slide-in` animations to the three breakdown cards (Base/Quality/Streak) with increasing `animation-delay`.
  - Add `xp-pulse` to the level progress bar.
- **Dependencies:** None.

**12. Feature H: Level-Up Celebration** [Size: M]

- **File:** New file `/components/LevelUpCelebration.tsx`
- **File:** `/components/Screens/ContributionFlow.tsx`
- **File:** `/index.html` (add confetti keyframes)
- **Design:**
  - Create `LevelUpCelebration` component: full-screen overlay (`fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-[#0f2b46]/90 backdrop-blur flex items-center justify-center`).
  - Content: large level number with `scale-in` animation, "Level Up!" text, confetti particles (pure CSS: 20-30 `<div>` elements with randomized `animation-delay`, `animation-duration`, colors from the palette, falling from top with rotation).
  - Auto-dismiss after 3 seconds or on tap.
  - Props: `level: number`, `language: 'en' | 'fr'`, `onDismiss: () => void`.
- **Integration in ContributionFlow:**
  - Define level thresholds: `const XP_PER_LEVEL = 100;` and compute `level = Math.floor(totalXp / XP_PER_LEVEL) + 1`.
  - After submission success, compare previous XP level to new XP level. If crossed threshold, set `showLevelUp = true`.
  - Render `<LevelUpCelebration>` conditionally before `<XPPopup>`. Show celebration first, then transition to XPPopup on dismiss.
  - This requires tracking `previousXp` -- read from `localStorage.getItem('adl_user_xp')` and update after each submission.
- **Dependencies:** Feature I (animation patterns established first).
- **CSS keyframes in `index.html`:**
  ```css
  @keyframes confetti-fall { 0% { transform: translateY(-100vh) rotate(0deg); opacity: 1; } 100% { transform: translateY(100vh) rotate(720deg); opacity: 0; } }
  @keyframes level-scale-in { 0% { transform: scale(0); opacity: 0; } 60% { transform: scale(1.2); } 100% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; } }
  ```

---

#### Phase 4: Admin Enhancements (P3)

**13. Feature L: Admin Split-Panel for Desktop** [Size: M]

- **File:** `/components/Screens/AdminQueue.tsx`
- **What to change:**
  - The current layout is a single column: header, controls, detail panel, then list. All inside `<div className="p-4 space-y-4">`.
  - Restructure the main content area (line 719, `<div className="p-4 space-y-4">`) to use a responsive split layout:
    - Wrap the controls section (risk filter, schema guard, assignment planner) in a top area that spans full width.
    - Below that, create a `<div className="lg:flex lg:gap-4">` container.
    - Left panel (`lg:w-[380px] lg:shrink-0 lg:overflow-y-auto`): the queue list (filteredGroups map at line 1180).
    - Right panel (`lg:flex-1 lg:overflow-y-auto`): the detail view (selectedGroup block at line 992).
    - On mobile (`< lg`), keep current stacked layout: detail above list.
  - Add `lg:h-[calc(100vh-200px)]` or similar to both panels for scroll containment on desktop.
  - The detail panel already has a close button (X); on desktop it can remain but the panel stays visible with a "select an item" placeholder when nothing is selected.
- **Dependencies:** None.

**14. Feature M: Admin Bulk Approve with Checkboxes** [Size: M]

- **File:** `/components/Screens/AdminQueue.tsx`
- **What to change:**
  - The bulk approve functionality already exists (line 562, `handleBulkApproveLowRisk`). It approves ALL low-risk pending items.
  - Enhance it with selective checkboxes:
    - Add state: `selectedForBulk: Set<string>` (point IDs).
    - Add a checkbox to each queue list item (line 1190) -- a `<div>` with a checkmark icon that toggles membership in `selectedForBulk`.
    - Add a "Select All Low-Risk" toggle button.
    - Modify `handleBulkApproveLowRisk` to only approve items in `selectedForBulk` if any are selected, otherwise fall back to all low-risk.
    - Show selected count in the bulk approve button label: `t('Approve Selected (N)', 'Approuver selectionnes (N)')`.
- **Dependencies:** Feature L (the checkbox UI works better with the split panel, but is not strictly required).

---

#### Phase 5: Nice-to-Have (P4)

**15. Feature P: Offline Map Tiles** [Size: L]

- **File:** New file `/public/sw.js` (service worker)
- **File:** `/index.html` or `/index.tsx` (service worker registration)
- **What to change:**
  - Create a service worker that intercepts tile requests matching `https://{s}.tile.openstreetmap.org/{z}/{x}/{y}.png`.
  - On install, pre-cache tiles for the Bonamoussadi area at zoom levels 14-17 (the area defined by `BONAMOUSSADI_CENTER` and the geofence bounds).
  - Use Cache API with a "tiles-v1" cache name.
  - Strategy: cache-first for tiles, network-first for API calls.
  - Registration: add `navigator.serviceWorker.register('/sw.js')` in the app entry.
  - Tile count estimation: Bonamoussadi is a small area. At zoom 14-17, approximately 100-400 tiles. Pre-cache on first load when online.
- **Dependencies:** None, but this is complex and lower priority. Consider deferring.
- **Risk:** Service worker caching can cause stale tile issues. Needs a versioned cache and clear strategy.

---

### Summary Table

| # | Feature | Files to Modify | Size | Phase | Dependencies |
|---|---------|----------------|------|-------|-------------|
| 1 | B: GPS Confidence Indicator | ContributionFlow.tsx | S | 1 | None |
| 2 | A+J: Photo Overlay Guides + Guidelines | ContributionFlow.tsx | M | 1 | None |
| 3 | D: Smart Defaults | ContributionFlow.tsx | S | 1 | None |
| 4 | C: Quality Preview Before Submit | ContributionFlow.tsx | M | 1 | Feature B |
| 5 | E: Voice Input | ContributionFlow.tsx (+ optional new component) | M | 1 | None |
| 6 | F: Weekly Target Visualization | Profile.tsx | S | 2 | None |
| 7 | G: Proximity Bar on Map | HomeMap.tsx, Home.tsx | M | 2 | None |
| 8 | N: Map Heat Map Layer | HomeMap.tsx, package.json | M | 2 | leaflet.heat dep |
| 9 | O: Assignment Zone Overlay | HomeMap.tsx, Home.tsx | S | 2 | Zone geometry data |
| 10 | I: XP Popup Animations | XPPopup.tsx, index.html | S | 3 | None |
| 11 | H: Level-Up Celebration | New LevelUpCelebration.tsx, ContributionFlow.tsx, index.html | M | 3 | Feature I |
| 12 | L: Admin Split-Panel | AdminQueue.tsx | M | 4 | None |
| 13 | M: Admin Bulk Checkboxes | AdminQueue.tsx | M | 4 | Feature L (soft) |
| 14 | P: Offline Map Tiles | New sw.js, index.html | L | 5 | None |

### Key Constraints Respected

- **Zero new API routes**: All features are frontend-only. GPS accuracy comes from `navigator.geolocation`. Quality scores are computed client-side. Level thresholds use localStorage. Voice uses Web Speech API. Heatmap uses existing point data.
- **Bilingual**: Every user-visible string uses `t('English', 'French')`.
- **12 serverless function limit**: Unchanged at 9.
- **Feature K already done**: The 4-step indicator (Type/Photo/GPS/Details) is already in the code at line 1668.

### Potential Challenges

1. **Feature E (Voice Input)**: `SpeechRecognition` browser support is inconsistent (no Firefox desktop, limited Safari). The `fr-CM` locale may not be available on all devices -- fallback to `fr-FR` then `fr`.
2. **Feature N (Heatmap)**: `leaflet.heat` needs to be added as a dependency or loaded from CDN. It is not typed, so a `declare module 'leaflet.heat'` stub may be needed.
3. **Feature H (Level-Up)**: Requires knowing the user's previous XP total. Using localStorage is the simplest approach but could get out of sync with server state. Accept this trade-off for a frontend-only solution.
4. **Feature P (Offline Tiles)**: Service workers are complex to debug. Tile pre-caching could consume significant bandwidth on first load. Suggest making it opt-in via Settings.

### Critical Files for Implementation

- `/Users/charlesvictormahouve/Documents/GitHub/africandatalayer/components/Screens/ContributionFlow.tsx` - Central file for 5 features (A, B, C, D, E); contains photo capture, GPS, form fields, step indicators, and submit flow
- `/Users/charlesvictormahouve/Documents/GitHub/africandatalayer/components/Screens/HomeMap.tsx` - Map component for features G, N, O; add proximity bar, heatmap layer, and zone polygons
- `/Users/charlesvictormahouve/Documents/GitHub/africandatalayer/components/XPPopup.tsx` - XP display for feature I animations; entry point for level-up celebration trigger
- `/Users/charlesvictormahouve/Documents/GitHub/africandatalayer/components/Screens/AdminQueue.tsx` - Admin review queue for features L and M; restructure layout and add bulk selection
- `/Users/charlesvictormahouve/Documents/GitHub/africandatalayer/index.html` - Global CSS keyframes for features H and I; animation definitions used across components
Let me read a few critical files to validate the plan details before finalizing.

# Plan: Implement Remaining Research UI Features

## Context
The research document (`research/08-ui-ux-design-research.md`) describes a comprehensive UI/UX spec. About 60% is implemented. The user wants all remaining features built, with the hard constraint of staying under Vercel's 12 serverless function limit (currently 9). **All features below are frontend-only — zero new API routes.**

---

## Phase 1: ContributionFlow Enhancements (5 features, all in one file)
> File: `components/Screens/ContributionFlow.tsx`

### 1A. GPS Confidence Indicator [S]
- Store `gpsAccuracy` state from `navigator.geolocation` (switch `getCurrentPosition` → `watchPosition` or capture `coords.accuracy`)
- In `renderCommonLocationBlock()`, render 5 dots below GPS readout: filled = `bg-[#4c7c59]`, empty = `bg-gray-200`
- Thresholds: ≤10m=5, ≤25m=4, ≤50m=3, ≤100m=2, >100m=1
- Bilingual label: Excellent/Good/Fair/Poor

### 1B. Photo Overlay Guides + Vertical Tips [M]
- Add `PHOTO_GUIDE_CONFIG` constant keyed by vertical ID with `{ frameLabel: {en,fr}, tips: Array<{en,fr}> }`
  - pharmacy: "Capture the green cross sign and full storefront"
  - mobile_money: "Show the provider logo and agent booth"
  - fuel_station: "Capture the brand sign and pump area"
  - alcohol_outlet: "Show the business sign and entrance"
  - billboard: "Capture the full billboard face including frame"
  - transport_road: "Capture the road surface and any blockage"
  - census_proxy: "Capture the full building from ground to roof"
- In `renderPhotoBlock()` when `!photoPreview`: overlay a dashed border guide frame (`absolute inset-4 border-2 border-dashed border-white/60 rounded-xl`) with centered vertical name
- Below photo block: render 2-3 bullet tips from config in `text-xs text-gray-500`

### 1C. Smart Defaults / Auto-fill [S]
- Read `localStorage.getItem('adl_last_vertical')` on mount as default vertical
- Save to localStorage on successful submission
- Default `isOpenNow` based on time: `true` if 8am-6pm, `false` otherwise

### 1D. Quality Preview Before Submit [M]
- New `renderQualityPreview()` function rendering a card before the submit button
- GPS accuracy score: map `gpsAccuracy` to 0-100 (≤10m=100, ≤25m=80, ≤50m=60, ≤100m=40, else 20)
- Photo score: 100 if photo exists, 0 otherwise
- Completeness: count filled required fields vs `VERTICALS[vertical].createRequiredFields`
- Estimated XP: `BASE_EVENT_XP` (from `shared/xp.ts`) + quality estimate
- Render as 2x2 grid with color-coded indicators
- **Depends on**: 1A (gpsAccuracy state)

### 1E. Voice Input [M]
- Create inline `VoiceMicButton` component (or `components/shared/VoiceMicButton.tsx`)
- Check `window.SpeechRecognition || window.webkitSpeechRecognition` availability
- Props: `onResult`, `language`, `disabled`
- Use `lang: 'fr-CM'` with fallback to `'fr-FR'` then `'fr'`
- Render `Mic` icon (lucide-react), red pulse when listening
- Graceful degradation: don't render if API unavailable
- Add next to text inputs in `renderCreateFields()` and `renderEnrichFieldInput()`

---

## Phase 2: Profile & Map Enhancements (4 features)

### 2A. Weekly Target Visualization [S]
> File: `components/Screens/Profile.tsx`
- `WEEKLY_TARGET = 50` constant
- Add a full-width card after the stats grid showing: `"This week: {pointsThisWeek}/50 target"` with progress bar
- Progress bar: `bg-gradient-to-r from-[#0f2b46] to-[#4c7c59]`
- Bonus text: "Complete 50 this week for a 20 XP bonus!"

### 2B. Proximity Bar on Map [M]
> Files: `components/Screens/HomeMap.tsx`, `components/Screens/Home.tsx`
- Add `nearbyEnrichCount` prop to HomeMap
- Render bottom overlay bar (`absolute bottom-4 inset-x-4 z-20`) when count > 0
- In Home.tsx: compute count using Haversine distance (agent geolocation vs points within 200m that have enrichable gaps)
- Pass computed count as prop to HomeMap

### 2C. Assignment Zone Overlay [S]
> Files: `components/Screens/HomeMap.tsx`, `components/Screens/Home.tsx`
- `CollectionAssignment` has `zoneBounds: { south, west, north, east }` — render as react-leaflet `<Rectangle>` with `fillColor: '#c86b4a'`, `fillOpacity: 0.1`, `weight: 2`
- Add `assignmentZones` prop to HomeMap
- Pass from Home.tsx using `assignments` state data

### 2D. Map Heat Map Layer [M]
> Files: `components/Screens/HomeMap.tsx`, `package.json`
- Install `leaflet.heat` package
- Add toggle button (Layers icon) in top-right map overlay
- When toggled: render heatmap from `mapPointGroups` as `[lat, lng, 1]` array
- Use `useMap()` hook in a `HeatmapLayer` child component to add/remove layer
- Add `declare module 'leaflet.heat'` type stub if needed

---

## Phase 3: XP & Engagement (2 features)

### 3A. XP Popup Animations [S]
> Files: `components/XPPopup.tsx`, `index.html`
- Add CSS keyframes to `index.html`:
  - `xp-count-up`: translateY(20px) + scale(0.8) → normal
  - `xp-slide-in`: translateX(-20px) → normal (staggered delays for 3 breakdown cards)
  - `xp-pulse`: subtle scaleX pulse on level progress bar
- Apply animations via `style={{ animation: '...' }}` on XPPopup elements

### 3B. Level-Up Celebration [M]
> Files: new `components/LevelUpCelebration.tsx`, `components/Screens/ContributionFlow.tsx`, `index.html`
- Full-screen overlay: `fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-[#0f2b46]/90 backdrop-blur`
- Content: large level number with scale-in animation, "LEVEL UP!" text, CSS confetti particles (20-30 divs with randomized fall animations)
- Auto-dismiss after 3s or on tap
- Level calculation: `Math.floor(totalXp / 100) + 1`
- Track previous XP in localStorage, compare after submission to detect level-up
- Show celebration before XPPopup, transition on dismiss
- Add `confetti-fall` and `level-scale-in` keyframes to `index.html`

---

## Phase 4: Admin Enhancements (2 features)

### 4A. Admin Split-Panel for Desktop [M]
> File: `components/Screens/AdminQueue.tsx`
- Wrap main content in `lg:flex lg:gap-4` container
- Left panel (`lg:w-[380px] lg:shrink-0 lg:overflow-y-auto lg:h-[calc(100%-200px)]`): queue list
- Right panel (`lg:flex-1 lg:overflow-y-auto`): detail view (currently selectedGroup block)
- On mobile (< lg): keep current stacked layout unchanged
- "Select an item" placeholder when nothing selected on desktop

### 4B. Admin Bulk Approve with Checkboxes [M]
> File: `components/Screens/AdminQueue.tsx`
- Add `selectedForBulk: Set<string>` state
- Checkbox on each queue list item toggling set membership
- "Select All Low-Risk" toggle button
- Modify existing `handleBulkApproveLowRisk` to use selection if non-empty
- Show selected count in button label

---

## Phase 5: Nice-to-Have (1 feature, defer if time-constrained)

### 5A. Offline Map Tiles [L]
> Files: new `public/sw.js`, `index.html` or `index.tsx`
- Service worker intercepting tile requests for `tile.openstreetmap.org`
- Pre-cache Bonamoussadi area at zoom 14-17 (~200 tiles) on first load
- Cache-first strategy for tiles, network-first for API
- **Complex, consider deferring or making opt-in via Settings**

---

## Files Modified Summary
| File | Features |
|------|----------|
| `components/Screens/ContributionFlow.tsx` | 1A, 1B, 1C, 1D, 1E, 3B |
| `components/Screens/Profile.tsx` | 2A |
| `components/Screens/HomeMap.tsx` | 2B, 2C, 2D |
| `components/Screens/Home.tsx` | 2B, 2C |
| `components/XPPopup.tsx` | 3A |
| `components/Screens/AdminQueue.tsx` | 4A, 4B |
| `index.html` | 3A, 3B (CSS keyframes) |
| `package.json` | 2D (leaflet.heat) |
| **New:** `components/LevelUpCelebration.tsx` | 3B |
| **New:** `components/shared/VoiceMicButton.tsx` | 1E (optional extraction) |
| **New (defer):** `public/sw.js` | 5A |

## Reuse References
- `shared/xp.ts` → `BASE_EVENT_XP`, `getEffectiveEventXp()`
- `shared/verticals.ts` → `VERTICALS`, `createRequiredFields`, vertical colors/labels
- `shared/types.ts` → `CollectionAssignment.zoneBounds: ZoneBounds { south, west, north, east }`
- Existing `t()` pattern for bilingual strings
- Card pattern: `bg-white p-4 rounded-2xl border border-gray-100 shadow-sm`
- Label pattern: `text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest`

## Verification
1. Run `npx vite build` — must succeed with no new errors
2. Confirm serverless function count unchanged: `find api -name "*.ts" | wc -l` → 9
3. Manual testing on iPhone Safari: GPS indicator visible, photo overlay renders, step dots accurate
4. Test ContributionFlow: select vertical → see overlay → capture photo → see GPS bar → see quality preview → submit → see XP animation → (level-up if threshold crossed)
5. Test Admin on desktop: split panel layout at ≥1024px, bulk checkboxes work
6. Test HomeMap: agent blue dot, assignment zone rectangle, proximity bar, heatmap toggle
